name: chat_completions_create
description: Generate a chat completion response given a conversation history of messages. Supports all open-source chat models hosted on Together AI including Llama, Mistral, Qwen, and DeepSeek with streaming, tool calling, JSON mode, and reasoning.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for the completion.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far. Each message has a 'role' (system, user, assistant) and 'content' (string).

example.content: What is the capital of France?

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 1. Lower values favor correctness.

parameters.name: top_p
parameters.description: Nucleus sampling parameter. Only tokens with cumulative probability up to top_p are considered.

parameters.name: top_k
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to consider at each generation step.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: If true, partial message deltas are sent as server-sent events.

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

parameters.name: repetition_penalty
parameters.description: Controls diversity by penalizing repeated sequences.

parameters.name: logprobs
parameters.description: Return log probabilities for top k tokens (0-20).

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: List of functions the model may call during generation.

parameters.name: tool_choice
parameters.description: Controls which function is called. Options: 'auto', 'none', or a specific function name.

parameters.name: reasoning_effort
parameters.description: Reasoning level for supported models: 'low', 'medium', or 'high'.

messages.content: What are some fun things to do in New York?

message.content: Here are some fun things to do in New York...
